main.description: A Sextant frame: the wire wrapper the bus stamps around a record. The record is user space (the client supplies it); the frame is bus space (the bus produces it). 'kind' discriminates the frame: a 'message' in flight, an 'artifact' at rest.

id.description: ULID stamped by the bus; also the deduplication key. Not supplied by the client.

kind.description: Frame kind: a message in flight or an artifact at rest.

epoch.description: Protocol epoch the bus wrote this frame under.

author.description: Authenticated client identity, taken by the bus from the request. Not supplied by the client and not forgeable by editing the record.

record.description: Typed lexicon record carried by the frame. The only part the client supplies.

revision.description: Artifact revision, stamped by the bus; advances on each write. Present only when kind is 'artifact'.

createdAt.description: Bus-stamped artifact creation time. Present only when kind is 'artifact'.

updatedAt.description: Bus-stamped time of the latest artifact write. Present only when kind is 'artifact'.
